args.code:
import pandas as pd
import json

filtered_businesses_df = pd.DataFrame(json.loads(locals()['var_function-call-16209033939604997572']))
reviews_df = pd.read_json(locals()['var_function-call-15033482819327707867'])

reviews_df['rating'] = reviews_df['rating'].astype(int)
average_ratings = reviews_df.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'average_rating'}, inplace=True)

merged_df = pd.merge(filtered_businesses_df, average_ratings, on='gmap_id')

sorted_businesses = merged_df.sort_values(by='average_rating', ascending=False)
top_5_businesses = sorted_businesses.head(5)

result = top_5_businesses[['name', 'hours', 'average_rating']].to_json(orient='records')

print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import pandas as pd
import json

filtered_businesses_df = pd.DataFrame(json.loads(locals()['var_function-call-16209033939604997572']))
reviews_df = pd.read_json(locals()['var_function-call-15033482819327707867'])

reviews_df['rating'] = reviews_df['rating'].astype(int)
average_ratings = reviews_df.groupby('gmap_id')['rating'].mean().reset_index()
average_ratings.rename(columns={'rating': 'average_rating'}, inplace=True)
